sections.description: Core settings & helpers for Patlis sites.
sections.faq:
Can I use this plugin on any WordPress site?

No, this plugin is designed specifically for Patlis platform websites.

What does this plugin do?

It provides core settings and shared functionality used by other Patlis plugins.

Is this plugin required?

Yes, this plugin is required for other Patlis modules to function correctly.

Can I deactivate this plugin?

No, deactivating this plugin may cause other Patlis plugins to stop working properly.

Where can I find the settings?

You can manage all core settings from the Patlis menu in the WordPress admin panel.
